---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command, flag, or behavior
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the concrete problem or workflow friction you're experiencing. Include the command or MCP tool you're using and what it can't do today.

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like `act` to do. Include example invocations if possible.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds are you using today? Why don't they satisfy the need?

## Additional context

Any relevant context — project size, number of concurrent agents, integration with other tools, etc.
